rationale: The real Ascension client ChrClasses.dbc carries 32 classes in the stock wow_class_id namespace (a superset of stock WotLK 1-9,11): it fills the stock class-10 hole and adds custom classes 12-32. GameTable class-indexed data (scalar/crit/regen) exists for all 32. This is a legitimate Ascension extension, recorded and accepted per Decision 22's representation-difference model, NOT an extraction defect. Class context (which wow_class_id a CoA class-type actor uses) remains M1.16's composite check; class_context_resolution stays 'unproven'.
